data.title: Corazon Mining Plans Modest Share Placement on ASX
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Corazon Mining Limited ( (AU:CZN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Corazon Mining Limited has notified the ASX of a proposed issue of up to 1,000 ordinary fully paid shares under a placement or similar equity mechanism. The securities, to be quoted under the ticker CZN, are scheduled for issue on 3 July 2026, reflecting the company’s continued use of small-scale capital raisings to fund activities.

The announcement confirms Corazon’s adherence to ASX Listing Rules, including commitments tied to Appendix 3B and subsequent quotation applications. While modest in size, the placement signals ongoing engagement with investors and supports liquidity and incremental financing within the company’s broader exploration and development strategy.

More about Corazon Mining Limited

Corazon Mining Limited is an Australian-listed resources company operating in the mining sector, with its ordinary fully paid shares trading on the ASX under the code CZN. The company accesses capital markets through placements and other equity issues to support its exploration and development activities in line with ASX listing requirements.

It leverages standard ASX disclosure and quotation processes, including the use of Appendix 3B for proposed security issues and subsequent Appendix 2A filings. This approach underscores Corazon Mining’s reliance on incremental capital raisings to fund operations within the highly regulated Australian mining and securities environment.

Average Trading Volume: 143,404

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$9.2M

Aurum Resources Limited ( (AU:AUE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Aurum Resources Limited has issued 2,500,000 fully paid ordinary shares following the conversion of performance rights, expanding its share capital base. The move reflects the company’s use of equity-based incentives and aligns with common practices in the Australian resources sector for rewarding performance and supporting ongoing development.

The company has lodged a cleansing notice under section 708A(5)(e) of the Corporations Act 2001, allowing secondary trading of these new shares without further disclosure. Aurum confirmed it is compliant with key reporting and continuous disclosure provisions, which is intended to reassure investors and facilitate orderly trading in its securities.

data.title: Cloetta’s CandyKing Pilots Swedish Pick & Mix Candy in U.S. Retail
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An update from Cloetta AB ( ($SE:CLA.B) ) is now available.

Cloetta’s CandyKing brand is expanding its reach beyond Europe, leveraging the global buzz around Swedish candy, which is prized for its quality and diverse flavors and shapes. The company’s pick & mix concept is already established in around 4,000 European retail outlets and aims to build on this foothold with bold international growth ambitions.

Cloetta has signed an agreement with New York premium supermarket chain DeCicco & Sons to pilot a large in-store CandyKing pick & mix solution, making it the first Swedish candy-based retail concept in U.S. grocery. The Brewster store installation, launched ahead of Independence Day, marks a strategic step in Cloetta’s North American expansion, with planned roll-out to additional DeCicco & Sons locations after the pilot, underscoring the company’s drive to capture rising U.S. demand for Swedish confectionery.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:CLA.B) stock is a Buy
with a SEK59.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cloetta AB stock,
see the SE:CLA.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Cloetta AB

Cloetta AB is a leading confectionery company in Northern Europe, best known for its CandyKing pick & mix brand founded in Stockholm in 1984. CandyKing has a strong presence across grocery stores, cinemas, amusement parks and airports in the Nordics and wider Europe, offering curated assortments of high-quality Swedish candy to consumers.

Average Trading Volume: 385,685

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK13.96B

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Computer Engineering & Consulting Ltd. ( (JP:9692) ).

Computer Engineering & Consulting Ltd., listed on the TSE Prime market under code 9692, operates in the information technology and consulting sector. The company provides computer engineering and related consulting services to corporate clients, positioning itself within Japan’s broader IT services industry.

With board authorization obtained on June 11, 2026, the company has begun a share buyback program, purchasing 244,900 common shares for about ¥507.5 million on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between June 12 and June 30, 2026. This is the first tranche of a planned acquisition of up to 1.2 million shares, capped at ¥2 billion through November 30, 2026, a move that may bolster shareholder value by reducing the free float and signaling confidence in its equity valuation.

data.title: Hitachi Reports Progress on Large-Scale Share Buyback Program
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Hitachi,Ltd. ( (JP:6501) ) is now available.

Hitachi, Ltd. has disclosed the status of its ongoing share repurchase program authorized by its board in April 2026 under the Companies Act of Japan and its Articles of Incorporation. Between June 1 and June 30, 2026, the company bought back 12,425,800 common shares on the Tokyo Stock Exchange for a total of ¥60,561,005,800.

As of June 30, 2026, cumulative repurchases under the current authorization amount to 20,346,300 shares, costing ¥99,999,580,300, against a maximum planned buyback of up to 160 million shares or ¥500 billion through March 31, 2027. The program underscores Hitachi’s ongoing capital management efforts, with potential implications for shareholder returns and capital structure as the buyback continues over the stated period.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:6501) stock is a Buy

data.title: AEM Wins Initial Dismissal in U.S. Patent Dispute With Advantest
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

AEM Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:AWX) ) has issued an announcement.

AEM Holdings Ltd. has announced that a U.S. court has dismissed a patent infringement complaint filed by Advantest Test Solutions, Inc. against the company and its subsidiaries, ruling that the original filing did not adequately allege direct or indirect infringement and that mere reference to AEM’s patent applications was insufficient to support the claims. While Advantest has been granted leave to amend its complaint, AEM stated it will continue to evaluate any further filings, remains ready to defend its own patents and intellectual property, and does not expect the current ruling to have a material impact on its operations or financial position, though it cautioned shareholders and investors to remain prudent and promised further updates as necessary.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:AWX) stock is a Buy
with a S$11.80 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AEM Holdings Ltd. stock,
see the SG:AWX Stock Forecast page.

More about AEM Holdings Ltd.

AEM Holdings Ltd. is a Singapore-listed company operating in the semiconductor and electronics test industry, providing testing solutions and related equipment to global chip and electronics manufacturers. Its business is closely tied to intellectual property and patent protection in advanced test technologies, making legal clarity around patents important for its operations and competitive positioning.

Average Trading Volume: 7,079,136

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$3.39B

Find detailed analytics on AWX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
